tasks.description: Tool detail panel + tool section detail panel — click tool/section node on canvas to show right-sidebar editing panel with all existing editable fields, debounced persistence, delete with Radix confirmation dialog. Also fix IMP-079 label inconsistency.
acceptance_criteria: Click tool node on canvas → right sidebar detail panel with editable fields: name (text input), description (rich text via dynamic TipTap import), category (text input), vendor (text input), url (text input), cost_per_month (number input), status (dropdown: active/considering/cancelled)
Field changes persist on blur/change with 500ms debounce via PATCH /api/v1/tools/[id] — use updateTool from client.ts
Delete tool via Radix Dialog confirmation → DELETE /api/v1/tools/[id] → remove node from canvas state
Click tool section node → right sidebar detail panel with editable fields: name (text input), description (rich text via dynamic TipTap import)
Delete tool section via Radix Dialog confirmation → DELETE /api/v1/tool-sections/[id] → remove node from canvas state
Detail panel replaces summary sidebar when a node is selected; summary sidebar returns when no selection active (pane click clears selection, close button clears selection)
Fix IMP-079: empty state secondary button label changed from 'Add Group' to 'Add Tool Section'

similar_files: src/components/panels/stage-detail-panel.tsx (183 lines — simpler pattern, good model for tool-section-detail-panel)
src/components/panels/step-detail-panel.tsx (629 lines — full pattern with all features, good model for tool-detail-panel structure)
patterns_to_follow: Debounced field updates via setTimeout refs — see stage-detail-panel.tsx nameTimeoutRef pattern
Dynamic import for RichTextEditor: const RichTextEditor = dynamic(() => import('./rich-text-editor'), { ssr: false })
handleFieldUpdate(field, value) async wrapper: calls API → onUpdate(updated) → catches with toastError
useEffect sync when entity.id changes to reset local state and handle node re-selection
Radix Dialog for delete confirmation — import DialogPrimitive from @radix-ui/react-dialog for Title (BUG-023 pattern)
React 19 useRef(null) — always provide initial value
learnings_relevant: TipTap SSR crash: TipTap editor must be lazy-loaded via dynamic() import
React 19 useRef: requires initial value useRef(null) not bare useRef()
apiFetch unwraps envelope: returns T directly — do NOT add nested property access
Custom DialogTitle wraps <h2> not DialogPrimitive.Title — use DialogPrimitive.Title directly (BUG-023)

tasks.special_instructions:
IMPORTANT ARCHITECTURE NOTES:
1. tools-canvas-view.tsx already has selectedToolId/selectedSectionId state (lines 126-131) and handleNodeClick/handlePaneClick (lines 278-294). The canvas selection is ALREADY WIRED — you just need to add conditional panel rendering.
2. Lines 342-518: summary sidebar renders when nothingSelected (neither tool nor section selected). Add tool detail panel when selectedToolId is set, tool section detail panel when selectedSectionId is set. These are mutually exclusive with the summary sidebar.
3. Tool type has fields: name, description, category, vendor, url, cost_per_month (number), status ('active'|'considering'|'cancelled'), position_x, position_y. Detail panel edits all EXCEPT position fields.
4. ToolSection type has fields: name, description, position_x, position_y, width, height. Detail panel edits name and description only.
5. API wrappers exist: updateTool(id, data), deleteTool(id), updateToolSection(id, data), deleteToolSection(id) — all in src/lib/api/client.ts.
6. When a tool/section is deleted, update local React Flow nodes state to remove the node. Use setNodes(prev => prev.filter(n => n.id !== deletedId)) pattern.
7. When a tool/section is updated via the panel, update the matching node's data in React Flow state: setNodes(prev => prev.map(n => n.id === updatedId ? { ...n, data: { ...n.data, tool: updatedTool } } : n)).
8. For IMP-079: search for 'Add Group' in tools-canvas-view.tsx and replace with 'Add Tool Section'.
9. Use DialogPrimitive.Title (not the custom ui/dialog.tsx DialogTitle) for accessibility (BUG-023 pattern).

tasks.description: Improvement status change optimistic update — apply visual state change immediately, revert on API failure with error toast
acceptance_criteria: Status dropdown change updates local ideas state immediately via setIdeas(prev => prev.map(...))
If API call (updateImprovementIdea) fails, revert to previous ideas state and show error toast

patterns_to_follow: Optimistic update: const prevIdeas = ideas; setIdeas(optimistic); try { await api() } catch { setIdeas(prevIdeas); toastError(...) }
BUG-017 optimistic rollback pattern — save previous state BEFORE mutation
learnings_relevant: React state immutability: use [...arr].map() not direct mutation

tasks.special_instructions: In handleStatusChange (around lines 58-65): 1) Save prev state: const prevIdeas = [...ideas]. 2) Optimistic update: setIdeas(prev => prev.map(i => i.id === id ? { ...i, status: newStatus } : i)). 3) Wrap API call in try/catch. 4) On error: setIdeas(prevIdeas) + toastError('Failed to update status'). Import toastError from '@/lib/api/toast-helpers' if not already imported.

tasks.description: Compare view empty state CTA button to create journey tab — replace passive text with actionable button
acceptance_criteria: Empty state (when no journey tabs exist) includes a visible CTA button styled with the Button component
Button creates a new journey tab via createTab API (with canvas_type='journey', workspace_id) and navigates to it on success

similar_files: src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/gap-analysis/gap-analysis-view.tsx (has similar empty state patterns with CTA buttons)
patterns_to_follow: useWorkspace() hook for workspace.id and tabs list
useRouter() from next/navigation for navigation after creation

tasks.special_instructions: Read compare-view.tsx to understand the current empty state text and structure. Add a Button component that calls createTab with { workspace_id, name: 'Journey', canvas_type: 'journey' }. On success, use router.push to navigate to the new tab: /w/${workspaceId}/${newTab.id}. Handle loading state on the button. Wrap the createTab call in try/catch with toastError on failure.
